content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be reengineered to rank and preserve only high-uncertainty, curiosity-aligned episodic traces generated by ICM/RND intrinsic reward signals, rather than storing all experienced interactions by default. This creates a self-pruning memory architecture where curiosity actively shapes what the agent retains for future active learning, eliminating low-value redundant memory bloat.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
